heroText: Urubuga rwagufashije gushaka sitasiyo cyangwa gusubira mu nzira? Urashaka gufasha kubigumisha ku buntu ku batwara amagare bandi? Umubare uwo ari wo wose ufasha kwishyura ububiko n'iterambere.
stripeNotice: Kwishyura gukomeye binyuze muri Stripe (USD). Nta makuru y'ikarite abikwa n'iyi porogaramu.
keepingFree: Kugumisha porogaramu ku buntu no kubungabunga
successMessage: Impano yawe ifasha kugumisha BicycleRepairStations ku buntu no kubungabungwa ku batwara amagare hose.
